column3: text
Onboarding
Icons and text are displayed correctly
Tapping "Get started" opens the bottom sheet for connecting a wallet
Add wallet
New wallet
When switching between the "Grab a pen and a piece of paper" and "Your recovery phrase" steps, the key values stay unchanged
When switching between the "Your recovery phrase" and "So, let’s check" steps, the values in the "So, let’s check" inputs change and the inputs are cleared
Field validation when moving to the next field
The "Continue" button is not active until all fields are filled
It is possible to set a password for confirming payments and accessing the wallet
If the password does not meet the minimum requirements, the corresponding error is displayed
If the second password does not match the first, the corresponding error is displayed
The wallet can be customized (name, icon/color). By default the name is "Account N" and an auto-generated wallet icon is used
After completing all steps, the wallet creation success screen appears, onboarding closes on its own and returns to the entry point
A W5 wallet is created by default
Wallet initialization happens together with the first outgoing transaction
New multi-wallet account
The creation flow is the same as "New wallet"
Additional wallets can be added by tapping the gear icon next to the wallet name -> Add new wallet
All multi-wallets are available under one seed phrase
Import wallet
It is possible to enter a secret key of 24 or 12 words
24 words are selected by default
There is a checksum check (test*24 or test*12)
Words can be entered one by one from the keyboard
All words can be pasted as a list
Field validation when moving to the next field
The "Incorrect phrase" error appears if at least one field has a validation error / the word is entered incorrectly
Password setup and customization steps are the same as when creating a wallet
W5 is always imported + older wallet versions are offered for import if they have funds
It is possible to import existing multisig (PRO subscription) and multi-wallet accounts as well
Watch only
It is possible to add a wallet by address/DNS
On the main screen only the "Receive" and "Buy" button is available
There is a Watch only badge near the address and on receive screen
Battery, seed phrase are hidden
When connecting to ton connect, there is an error: "The operation is not available for this wallets. Select another wallet and try again."
Hardware wallets
Pair with Signer
It is possible to connect Signer by QR code
It is possible to connect Signer by deep link (when Signer and Tonkeeper PRO is on one mobile device)
There is a Signer badge next to address
Battery, Back up, Gasless, TRON address generation are hidden
It is possible to send a regular TON, Jetton, NFT transaction (fee in TON)
It is possible to connect to a DApp WITHOUT tonproof and sign a ton connect transaction
It is possible to make a native Omniston swap (Swap button on the main screen)
It is possible to confirm stake deposit/withdrawal
It is possible to renew DNS, TG Username
Pair with Ledger
Connects by USB
Generates 10 addresses by default
Addresses with available balance are preselected when importing
There is a Ledger badge next to address
Battery, Back up, Gasless, TRON address generation are hidden
It is possible to send a regular TON, Jetton, NFT transaction (fee in TON)
It is possible to connect to a DApp with tonproof and sign a ton connect transaction
It is possible to make a native Omniston swap (Swap button on the main screen)
It is possible to confirm stake deposit/withdrawal
It is possible to renew DNS, TG Username
Pair with keystone
Connects by QR
There is a Keystone badge next to address
Battery, Back up, Gasless, TRON address generation are hidden
For onramps/exchange, USDT TRC20 deposit/withdrawal is hidden (because the address cannot be passed)
It is possible to send a regular TON, Jetton, NFT transaction (fee in TON)
It is possible to connect to a DApp with tonproof and sign a ton connect transaction
It is possible to make a native Omniston swap (Swap button on the main screen)
It is possible to confirm stake deposit/withdrawal
It is possible to renew DNS, TG Username
Other options
Testnet account
It is possible to add by seed phrase
On the main screen only the "Send", "Multi Send" and "Receive" buttons are available
There is a Testnet badge
Transactions are sent on testnet
Wallet version management
Main screen -> gear icon next to the wallet name (appears on hover)
A wallet version can be hidden or added
Wallet management
Preferences  -> Manage wallets
Manage wallets screen
All connected wallets are displayed: their names, address, version
A wallet can be dragged to any position in the list using the "three lines" handle
The position is remembered
Next to the wallet there is a "three dots" menu
Rename: wallet customization can be changed
Backup
Opens the screen with the secret phrase for the selected wallet
Password is required to show the secret phrase
The Copy button saves the phrase to the clipboard
Delete Account
Opens the wallet sign-out confirmation screen
The Sign out button is inactive until the user checks "I have a backup copy of recovery phrase"
The Back up now button opens the screen with the secret phrase
Password is required to show the secret phrase
The wallet that was signed out of disappears from the wallet list
Main screen
On the left, a list of all connected wallets with their names, addresses, and versions is displayed
At the top, the correct total balance of the selected wallet in fiat is displayed (TON + jettons)
Buy +
Available onramps are displayed
The "Other ways to buy" button leads to the TON Community Telegram channel (EN: @toncoin / RU: @toncoin_rus)
Warning screen
Warning about opening an external app with working links to Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
Opens on the first visit and if "Do not show again" is not selected
Receive ↓
Opens the "Receive {{token}}" screen
It is possible to switch tabs between TON and TRC20 addresses
If TRC20 is not on the balance, the first time the user opens the TRC20 tab, enabling it is suggested
The network address is shown correctly
The QR code contains a deeplink with the correct address
ton://transfer/{{address}} for TON
{{address}} for TRON
ton://transfer/{{address}}&jetton={{jetton_master}} for other TON tokens (available from the token screen)
It is possible to copy the address by tapping on the QR, address or Copy
It is possible to share the address in Telegram
Send TON
ctrl+c/ctrl+v works in all fields
Send screen
Address
It is possible to enter [TON wallet address] OR [dns] OR [tg username]
Validation works if the address field is filled incorrectly
Comment
It is possible to enter letters/numbers/special characters/emojis
There is no limit on the number of characters in the comment
If the transfer is to an exchange address, an orange warning is shown and the user cannot proceed to the next screen
Amount
Currency selection
TON currency is displayed by default
If the entry point was the token screen, the selected token is displayed for sending
It is possible to change the sending currency on the amount input screen
Reset the amount when switching the token if it was previously entered
When switching to a token with a different number of decimal places, verify that the correct amount is sent
"Amount" field
Integer and fractional amounts can be entered. Up to 24 characters total (including the separator). After the decimal point, at most as many digits as the token allows (TON = 9, USDT = 6)
Validation error when entering > current balance
It is possible to enter the entire balance by pressing "Maximum" or by hand
The "Available:" value decreases after entering the amount
It is possible to specify the amount in fiat, there is a swap button to switch
Tapping Continue opens the transaction confirmation screen
The "Continue" button is not active until the "Address or domain" and "Amount" fields are filled
Confirm transaction screen
The name of the wallet you are sending from is displayed
If transferring to a favorite contact or via DNS, the "Recipient" field with the name is displayed
For tokens - the sending amount is indicated in tokens, the fee in TON
For all amounts the conversion to fiat is displayed
The recipient address, transfer amount and fee are displayed
The address and dns name of the recipient can be copied
After tapping "Confirm and send", PIN or biometric confirmation opens
After entering the PIN or biometrics, the History screen opens (same for other transactions)
Scaled UI tokens
The scaled_ui jetton balance is displayed scaled: balance * numerator / denominator
When sending the jetton, the user enters a scaled amount, but the unscaled amount is sent on-chain
History shows the scaled amount
in token-specific history
in general history
Send USDT TRC20
It is possible to enter/scan/paste a TRON wallet address
Only USDT TRC20 can be sent; the flow is similar to Send TON
USDT TRC20 can be sent for battery, TON and TRX
On the USDT TRC20 screen, the "N Transfers available" line is shown. The transfer count is calculated correctly.
If there are not enough funds for fees
Available fee payment methods are listed: Battery, TON, TRX
Required values per one transfer is shown correctly
Refill Battery -> opens the Battery screen
Refill TON -> opens the Receive Toncoin screen
Refill TRX -> opens the Receive Tron TRX screen
Insufficient balance for an action or transaction
The "Not enough funds" screen is displayed
Swap Omniston
The user can enter an amount in the Send/Receive fields
While waiting for Omniston, a loader spins on the Continue button and the rate is shown in gray with animation
After the response arrives, the loader disappears and the Omniston rate is shown in white as usual
Tapping Continue
the client unsubscribes from new swap events
The Send/Receive toggle swaps amount and token completely [bug]
The user can set maximum
For the TON-token pair, the maximum will be reduced by the fee amount
Token selection (swaps are only inside TON):
The TON assets/Other crypto labels are not shown yet
All tokens are shown in one list without collapsing
For Send: balance is shown next to each token; sort order is TON first, then by balance descending
For Receive: full name is shown next to each token; sort order matches the backend
Token search works:
Before search starts, the full token list is shown
Search starts from one character
A stub is shown if nothing is found
The approximate exchange rate is shown on two lines
Confirm Swap screen
A timer on the slider shows time left before signing (provider quote expires)
When the timer expires -> error "Swap expired..." is shown
After confirmation, the success screen appears, then navigation to general or token-specific history (depending on entry point)
The provider is always shown as Omniston (value from the backend)
Staking Screen
Tonstakers
Feature: after sending a TON deposit, an equivalent amount of tsTON tokens arrives on the balance
tsTON can be sent/swapped like a regular token
From the pool screen → tsTON
Standard sending flow → choose tsTON in the token list
Deposit - "Stake"
Tonstakers: minimum 2.2 TON (from 1 TON we can stake; 1.2 TON we force to leave on the balance to cover fees) [the 1.2 TON fee checks have not been done yet]
The value of staked funds is displayed in TON and fiat next to the pool name (in the token list, on the pool screen)
Withdrawal request - "Unstake"
Information about the next cycle is displayed, the time changes in real time
The user can request withdrawal of part or all funds
Withdrawal ready
Tonstakers -> TON arrives on the balance automatically
Tokens
The correct exchange rate is displayed for TON and jettons
The list of visible jettons can be set in Settings (Manage tokens)
Jettons can be sorted by dragging
By default, blacklist tokens are hidden
Tapping TON opens the Toncoin screen
Tapping <token> opens the <token> screen
<jetton> or TON screen
The correct balance is displayed (only for tokens for which a rate comes from tonapi)
Send and receive flows work according to the TON send and receive rules
Transaction history is displayed correctly, only transactions for the specific jetton
Collectibles
If there are no NFTs, the Collectibles tab is not displayed
The NFT list is displayed correctly, with all images
NFTs are sorted by [the NFT interacted with last is on top, as returned from tonapi]
Tapping an NFT opens the NFT description block
Name, image, description
Verified NFT collections have a checkmark icon next to the name
The "View on nft market" button works correctly
The "View in explorer" / "View details" button opens tonviewer.com
The "Collapse" button
The "Send NFT" button
Opens the send flow
The "Wallet address" input accepts a TON network wallet, Favorite name, DNS, or TG username
After confirming the send, the send status appears at the bottom of the screen
DNS & TG usernames
All DNS entries are moved to a separate Domains tab
Transfer works
Domain linking works
It is possible to link to your own address
It is possible to link to someone else's address
It is possible to unlink
Domain renewal works (for 1 year = 366 days)
If 30 or fewer days remain until domain lease expiration -> the text under the button turns red + a fire icon appears in the NFT grid on the main screen
TG Username
Works the same as DNS (except renewal)
NFT on sale
NFTs on sale are marked with the ON SALE badge in the NFT grid and on the NFT screen
Send, Link, and Renew buttons are inactive if the NFT is on sale
History screen
Transaction history
If transactions are less than a month old, they are grouped by day; if older, by month
All old transactions are loaded
All related transactions are split into blocks like on tonapi.io
All transactions appear in history in the background - first pending, then completed (or completed immediately if the transaction was fast)
Transaction details open (fiat conversion is shown)
Incoming (TON, Token, NFT)
Icon, amount, sender address, comment
In the bottom sheet: amount, send date, sender, transaction address, fee, comment
Recipient address and transaction hash can be copied
Spam transactions have a SPAM badge, the comment is hidden
column5:
Спам транзакция имеет флаг is_scam = true

Бекэнд смотрит на текст, сумму, количество исходящих транзакций у отправителя и то, есть ли он в блэклисте, чтобы определить присвоить ли флаг.

column3: Outgoing (TON, Token, NFT)
Icon, amount, fee, recipient address, comment
In the bottom sheet: amount, send date, recipient address, transaction address, fee, comment
Full recipient address and transaction hash can be copied
Tapping an NFT image in history opens the NFT screen
The View Transaction button on transaction details opens Tonviewer.com
Ton Connect 2.0
Connection to service
column5:
Демо-дапп для тестов https://ton-connect.github.io/demo-dapp-with-react-ui/


https://tonconnect-sdk-demo-dapp-no-qa.vercel.app/
https://tonconnect-sdk-demo-dapp.vercel.app/

QA использует стейдж воллет лист и отправляет транзы с ошибками
no QA это прод окружение, т.е. прод воллеты и не отправляет транзу если есть ошибки

column3: Through desktop/mobile/TWA browser
Does not disconnect after a page refresh or when the app is closed and reopened
Working with a service
Action confirmation from the extension
The transaction bottom sheet opens automatically
The transaction completes successfully after confirmation
A cancellation message appears in the dApp if the transaction is cancelled in the wallet
The transaction is emulated correctly
Disconnecting from a service
When disconnecting a dApp, the bridge connection is closed
Preferences
Security
Lock Screen -> on/off
When enabled, password/biometrics are requested on first app open
Change PIN code -> the old PIN code no longer works
Biometrics -> enables biometrics
Reset security settings -> allows resetting the password
Primary currency
The current currency is displayed
A new screen with a list of currencies opens
Changing the currency -> changes it everywhere (main screen, send amount screen, TON balance)
Write to team -> opens the mail app with prefilled support email
Legal documents
Support -> Opens the Telegram bot @tonkeeper
Tonkeeper news -> RU/EN locale (@tonkeeper_ru / @tonkeeper_news)
Settings
Backup
Recovery phrase is displayed
Copy -> copies the Recovery phrase
Sign out
Opens the wallet sign-out confirmation screen
The Sign out button is inactive until the user checks "I have a backup copy of recovery phrase"
The Back up now button opens the screen with the secret phrase
Password is required to show the secret phrase
The wallet that was signed out of disappears from the wallet list
2FA
It is possible to enable 2FA for signing transactions via Telegram
Telegram account is linked successfully
A transaction can be confirmed in Telegram -> the transaction is signed and sent to blockchain
It is no longer possible to sign a transaction without confirming it in Telegram
It is no longer possible to sign a transaction without confirming it in Telegram
2FA can be unlinked -> verify that unlinking succeeded and transactions can now be signed without Telegram
Import by Private key
It is possible to import a wallet by private key (enabled in the dev menu)
Deeplinks / QR code scanner
The scanner works from the address input screen (send flow)
The browser requests camera access
If access is not granted, the camera is dark (a placeholder can be added)
Transfer
ton://transfer/:walletid
column5:
Opens the pre-filled Send screen and offers user to enter the missing data
ton://transfer/<address>?amount=<nanocoins>&text=<url-encoded-utf8-text>

примеры:

ton://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n

ton://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?amount=10000

ton://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?text=just%20message

ton://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?amount=7000&text=just%20message

column3: tonkeeper://transfer/:walletid
column5:
Opens the pre-filled Send screen and offers user to enter the missing data
tonkeeper://transfer/<address>?amount=<nanocoins>&text=<url-encoded-utf8-text>

примеры:

tonkeeper://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n

tonkeeper://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?amount=10000

tonkeeper://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?text=just%20message

tonkeeper://transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?amount=7000&text=just%20message

column3: https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/:walletid
column5:
Opens the pre-filled Send screen and offers user to enter the missing data
https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/<address>?amount=<nanocoins>&text=<url-encoded-utf8-text>

примеры:

https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n

https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?amount=10000

https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?text=just%20message

https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/EQD2NmD_lH5f5u1Kj3KfGyTvhZSX0Eg6qp2a5IQUKXxOG21n?amount=7000&text=just%20message

column3: https://app.tonkeeper.com/transfer/:walletid?jetton=:address (also works with ton:// and tonkeeper://)
Different parameters can be filled in (amount, recipient, comment) *link examples are added in notes next to the deeplinks
All parameters are set in the corresponding fields
When scanning an invalid/unsupported QR code - toast "Unexpected QR Code"
PRO Subscription
It is possible to subscribe with Get Tonkeeper PRO
Or it offers to subscribe when trying to use a PRO feature
After payment, the subscription is activated successfully
The subscription can be cancelled in Settings -> Tonkeeper PRO -> Transfers
Recurring crypto payments (crypto subscription plugin)
iOS: Preferences => get TK Pro => Payment method 2 options: App Store & Crypto
The subscription price changes dynamically: $ for in-app, TON for crypto
Changing the wallet succeeds
App Store subscription purchase succeeds
Crypto subscription purchase succeeds
Verify that payment is charged automatically after one month for the subscription
The subscription is shared between wallet versions: on the backend the subscription is tied to the wallet public key, which is the same across several versions
If an IAP subscription is purchased, it cannot be cancelled on desktop
PRO features
Multisig Wallet
New multisig wallet
It is possible to create a multisig wallet
If the wallet does not have enough funds for multisig deployment - validation error
The add wallet page contains "Participants", "Wallet addresses" blocks with the "Add Participant" button, "Quorum" + "Create wallet" button
Wallet field -> a wallet can be selected
Wallet field -> the wallet can be changed (selected from the list) - arrows can be used to select another management wallet
Wallet customization - accepts emoji, letters, special characters
Tapping Save opens the PRO wallet main page; the newly created multisig wallet is displayed in the Multisig wallets tab
The created multisig wallet is displayed in the left sidebar with a MULTISIG badge under the host wallet
Wallet and Participants blocks
Wallet field -> selected wallet
Wallet address -> ctrl+c/ctrl+v works in the field
Wallet address -> [wallet address], hex, dns can be entered
Wallet address -> validation works if the address field is filled incorrectly
Adding 2 identical wallet addresses -> a validation error appears
Adding a wallet address in the wrong format -> a validation error appears
Add participant -> a new wallet address field appears
Editing participants
Multiple Participants can be added
Any participant can be removed
A removed participant can be added again
Quorum block
Default value - 100% of participants
The default value changes dynamically until changed manually
Options: 1, 2, 3, 4... participants
The selected number of participants is applied and saved
Fewer participants than wallets can be selected, for example 75% - the wallet is created -> verify that 2 of 3 participants are required to sign
Select 3 participants -> finish adding the wallet -> complete a transaction -> verify that 3 participants are required to sign
Select 1 participant -> finish adding the wallet -> complete a transaction -> verify that 1 participant is required to sign
Adding more participants than addresses -> a validation error appears
Customize block
After multisig wallet deployment, set icon/color and wallet name
Multisig Wallet functionality
Left toolbar - wallet list with version badges
Right toolbar - tokens, collectibles, history, swap, Settings, Requests - if multisig is selected in the left toolbar
Verify adding existing multisig wallets
Multisig feature is available only with PRO subscription / trial
Host wallet
Multisig can be created -> host is a regular wallet / multi-account / Ledger / KeyStone / Signer
Transaction signatures
Signing is possible with a regular wallet / multi-account / Ledger / KeyStone / Signer
Multisig Wallets section
The section contains a list of all multisig wallets created under the corresponding host wallet
A multisig wallet can be pinned/unpinned
Tapping Open opens the multisig wallet
For each multisig, name, address, and balance in TON are displayed
For host wallets without a multisig, a button to create a multisig wallet and learn more about multisig is displayed
Multisig Settings
Multisig can be customized
Token list
Multisig wallet can be hidden
Requests
While in multisig -> Requests -> empty screen if there were no requests
A list of all requests is displayed
Columns: created, status, quorum, action
For orders in progress, Time left hh:mm:ss - countdown
For orders in progress, the View button is active
For Expired, Completed orders, the View button is inactive
The transaction is displayed correctly: correct amount, token
The quorum participant count on the screen matches the count in the modal opened by tapping View
Actions
Sending a transaction -> opens the New Multi Signature Request creation modal
Multisig configuration can be changed (e.g. add/remove a participant) and confirmed in TonkeeperPRO
A transaction is sent from the host multisig wallet (the one used for deployment)
A transaction is sent from a non-host multisig wallet (one of the signers)
Multisend from multisig works
The dashboard displays multisigs
Standard dialog for creating regular transfers
For signing existing orders, a dialog like Ton Connect for regular wallets
For creating orders through Ton Connect, a dialog like Ton Connect for regular wallets
Re-voting is not possible
Cancelling your own signature is not possible
Other signers' voting results are visible to other signers in the wallet when tapping View
Any multisig participant can complete a transaction, not only the host wallet under which the multisig was created
The Actions column on the requests screen displays transactions correctly - USDT send, swap, NFT, etc.
New Multi Signature Request
The modal can be closed
The modal leads to selecting the time allowed for signing the transaction
Default is 1 hour
Another time can be selected - the selected time is used for the countdown
The Continue button leads to request creation
Status In Progress
Status is highlighted in green (time)
The modal matches the design (opens when tapping View) - the transaction can be signed there
Status stays active until all signers have voted
After the last signer votes, the status changes to Completed
The number of signers updates dynamically after signing the transaction
All participants can view transaction details and status in the modal by tapping View
Details can be viewed in tonviewer
Status Completed
Status is gray
The modal matches the design (opens when tapping View)
All participants can view transaction details and status in the modal by tapping View
Details can be viewed in tonviewer
Status Expired
Status is gray
The modal matches the design (opens when tapping View)
If voting time expires, the status changes to Expired
Buttons for signing the transaction disappear
All participants can view transaction details, who already signed, and status in the modal by tapping View
Multi-Wallet Accounts
Tapping New Multi-Wallet Account creates a parent wallet under one master seed phrase
Tapping the gear icon adds child wallets (maximum 3 without PRO subscription)
All child wallets are available under the master seed phrase
Each child wallet also has its own seed phrase that gives access only to that wallet
Add button to create Tonkeeper Mnemonic
a blue MULTI label is displayed
edit option for the master wallet
master wallet backup
all child wallets are displayed + badge (ordinal number)
all child wallets + badge (ordinal number) are in order
all child wallets display address + balance in TON
edit option for sub-wallets
Tapping Open opens the wallet
Tapping Hide removes the wallet from the menu list
Add New Wallet -> adds a child wallet
Sign out of a newly added child wallet and sign in again with the master wallet seed phrase -> success, all added wallets are displayed and available for transactions
Multisend [DESKTOP ONLY]
Multiple transactions can be sent at once
Manual input
Multi Send -> New List
Two rows are added with columns: Recipient, Sum, Comment
More rows can be added manually
Rows can be deleted with the cross button
The sending asset can be changed in the dropdown
Import CSV
A pre-filled CSV file can be imported (Upload)
The CSV template is shown as Table Example before import
After import, all rows and columns are transferred correctly: Recipient, Sum, Asset, Comment
Export CSV
A CSV with filled rows can be exported
Multisend is sent successfully, all data is sent correctly
Priority Support
Can be tested on prod Preferences -> Priotity Support
With an active subscription, users receive a URL with a token for priority support
Priority support link type "url": "https://t.me/tonkeeper?start=<priority_support_token>"
When opening the link with a priority support token, the user is directed straight to the operators channel, bypassing the bot
With an expired subscription or without a subscription, users receive "url": "https://t.me/tonkeeper" - the priority support token must not be provided
Free USD₮ TRC20 transfer (1 transfer available / Available every month)
Paying the fee with a free transfer succeeds (PRO subscription only)
Only 1 free transfer per month is available
For trial - no free transfers should be available
After using a free transfer - it shows when the next one will be available; a second one is not granted
In the following month, a new free transfer is available for use
An unused free transfer expires
The free transfer bonus is displayed on the status screen (Preferences => Tonkeeper Pro)
Import from Fireblocks
The add wallet modal has a button to add a wallet by private key from Fireblocks
Import by private key from Fireblocks succeeds, transactions succeed
Character count validation is present - 64 chars, hex format
If a regular private key is added in the Fireblocks block -> validation error failed to process secret key
Desktop App [DESKTOP ONLY]
Window management
Window can be minimized and restored on macOS
Window can be minimized and restored on Windows
App minimizes to tray on macOS (dock icon behavior)
App minimizes to system tray on Windows
Restoring app from tray shows the wallet in the same state as before minimize
Auto-update
Auto-update notification appears when a new version is available
Clicking the update notification triggers the update flow
After update the wallet data and session are preserved
Keychain storage (keytar)
Mnemonic/keys are stored in macOS Keychain (not plaintext on disk)
Mnemonic/keys are stored in Windows Credential Store (not plaintext on disk)
After OS reboot the wallet unlocks correctly using stored keychain credentials
Multi-window behavior
Two desktop windows can be opened simultaneously
No double-spend when the same transaction is initiated from two windows
Wallet state (balance/history) is consistent between two open windows
No state corruption after closing one of two windows
Desktop keyboard shortcuts
Cmd+C copies address in address fields on macOS
Ctrl+C copies address in address fields on Windows
Cmd+V pastes address in address fields on macOS
Ctrl+V pastes address in address fields on Windows
Deep link handling via custom URL scheme
tonkeeper:// deep links open the correct screen on macOS
tonkeeper:// deep links open the correct screen on Windows
Deep link received while app is closed — app opens and handles the link
Deep link received while app is minimized to tray — app restores and handles the link
Badge for pending TC requests
macOS dock badge shows pending Ton Connect request count correctly
Windows taskbar badge shows pending Ton Connect request count correctly

Send — extended scenarios
Failure after sign before broadcast
Enable airplane mode after signing but before tx broadcast — UI and history stay consistent, no phantom transaction
Maximum comment length
Enter maximum-length memo in Send form — accepted or rejected per product rules; no crash
Double-tap Send confirm
Tap Confirm twice rapidly on Send confirm screen — at most one transaction sent
Wallet switch during active send
Switch wallet while Send flow is in progress — safe abort or blocking; no unintended tx from wrong wallet
Network failure mid-send
Network disconnects while send is in progress — error shown or pending state with recovery; no silent failure
Kill app after broadcast

Offline before broadcast
Attempt send with no network before tx reaches chain — clear error message; retry succeeds when network returns
Offline after broadcast
Disconnect network immediately after broadcast — tx shows pending then confirmed after sync resumes
Reject password or biometrics during send
Decline auth (password or biometric prompt) on a protected send — no transaction created; returns to idle state
